data.name: Green Cart
data.description: Green Cart is a full-stack MERN-based e-commerce application built with a modular architecture where React handles the client-side UI, Redux Toolkit manages global application state, Node.js and Express power the RESTful backend APIs, MongoDB with Mongoose provides a scalable NoSQL data layer, JWT-based authentication secures user sessions, bcryptjs ensures password hashing, Axios enables frontend–backend communication, Tailwind CSS provides utility-first responsive styling, and the application is deployed on Vercel for efficient cloud hosting and continuous deployment.

data.name: Wanderlust
data.description: 📦Wanderlust is a full-stack web application built using Node.js and Express.js with EJS as the server-side templating engine for dynamic page rendering. The application uses a relational SQL database for structured data management, implementing normalized schemas for users, listings, and reviews. Backend logic follows RESTful routing and MVC architecture, while middleware-based authentication and request handling ensure secure and efficient application workflow..
